scripts.dist:exe: npm run build && cmd /c "rmdir /S /Q dist_staging & mkdir dist_staging" && cmd /c "xcopy /E /I /Y .next\standalone dist_staging" && cmd /c "mkdir dist_staging\.next\static & xcopy /E /I /Y .next\static dist_staging\.next\static" && cmd /c "mkdir dist_staging\public & xcopy /E /I /Y public dist_staging\public" && cmd /c "mkdir dist_staging\src\main & xcopy /Y src\main\main.js dist_staging\src\main\" && cmd /c "copy package.json dist_staging\" && node scripts/cleanup_dist.js && npx electron-packager dist_staging EventSequencer v0.9.2 --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist --overwrite --icon=public/favicon.ico --prune=false
